metadata.description: Claude Code plugins bundled with the Alleato PM construction platform — development workflow, code review, design, and form-testing tooling.

plugins.name: claude-opus-4-5-migration
plugins.description: Migrate code and prompts from Sonnet 4.x and Opus 4.1 to Opus 4.5.

plugins.name: code-review
plugins.description: Automated PR code review using multiple specialized agents with confidence-based scoring.

plugins.name: commit-commands
plugins.description: Git workflow commands for committing, pushing, and creating pull requests.

plugins.name: explanatory-output-style
plugins.description: Adds educational insights about implementation choices and codebase patterns.

plugins.name: feature-dev
plugins.description: Comprehensive feature development workflow with agents for exploration, architecture, and review.

plugins.name: form-testing
plugins.description: Automated form discovery and testing agents that exercise create/edit flows and report field-level errors.

plugins.name: frontend-design
plugins.description: Frontend design skill for UI/UX implementation.

plugins.name: hookify
plugins.description: Create hooks to prevent unwanted behaviors by analyzing conversation patterns.

plugins.name: learning-output-style
plugins.description: Interactive learning mode that requests meaningful code contributions at decision points.

plugins.name: plugin-dev
plugins.description: Toolkit for building Claude Code plugins: creators, a validator, and structure/hook/MCP skills.

plugins.name: pr-review-toolkit
plugins.description: PR review agents for comments, tests, error handling, type design, code quality, and simplification.

plugins.name: ralph-wiggum
plugins.description: Continuous self-referential AI loops for iterative development.

plugins.name: security-guidance
plugins.description: Security reminder hook warning about command injection, XSS, and unsafe code patterns when editing files.

plugins.name: signal-noise-audit
plugins.description: Audit and fix visual noise in the UI per the Signal Over Noise principle.
